phases.title: Write experiment report
phases.instructions: Summarize Exp-A through Exp-G results into a unified report at docs/experiments-summary.md.

constraints: Report must be readable by non-technical stakeholders
acceptance: Human reviewer confirms report quality meets standards

ground_truth_rationale: The acceptance criterion 'Human reviewer confirms report quality meets standards' is not a shell command. This violates isShellCmd for acceptance. The phase itself is valid. Clear single-invariant violation.
